overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vehicle journey from the desert Badlands into Night City. The clip begins on a dark, rainy dirt road lined with transmission towers, then transitions to a paved highway at dawn with neon-lit industrial towers and billboards lining the approach to the metropolis.

events.description: oncoming vehicle with headlights passes by on the left side of the dirt road
ego vehicle accelerates while following the car ahead on the uneven terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating a dirt road through desert terrain at night, following a vehicle ahead with visible taillights

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead on the dirt road, brake lights occasionally illuminating

entered.detail: tall metal lattice power line towers with multiple cables stretching into the distance
unpaved desert track with visible tire marks and uneven surface
sparse desert vegetation including small bushes and dry grasses
faint glow of city lights visible on the dark horizon

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dark, rainy desert landscape on an unpaved road. Transmission towers line the left side while sparse vegetation dots the right. A vehicle ahead provides the only other light source besides the distant city glow on the horizon.

events.description: abrupt transition from dirt road to paved highway, lighting shifts from night to dawn with orange sky visible
passing under large overhead highway sign gantry indicating directions to Santo Domingo
vehicle changes lanes to the right while maintaining speed, passing illuminated billboards

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on a paved multi-lane highway, overtaking other vehicles while approaching the city's neon-lit skyline

notable_agents.action: truck driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed toward the city

entered.detail: smooth multi-lane asphalt road with white lane markings and reflective studs
large metal overhead structure supporting directional road signs
tall industrial chimneys or towers wrapped in colorful neon lighting and advertisements
large illuminated billboard displaying advertisement for QARRA with figure holding camera
elevated highway or monorail structure crossing over the main road

changed.to: prominent neon-lit buildings with detailed architecture

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a paved highway at dawn with an orange and purple sky. Neon-lit industrial towers dominate the left skyline while illuminated billboards for QARRA and other brands line the right side. The camera passes under overhead sign gantries and overpasses while following traffic toward the glowing metropolis ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a desolate, rain-swept desert into the neon-lit outskirts of a sprawling metropolis. It begins on a dark, unpaved road where transmission towers line the left and sparse vegetation dots the right, with only the taillights of a leading vehicle and a distant horizon glow piercing the gloom. As the terrain shifts from dirt to a paved highway, the atmosphere transforms into a dawn landscape under an orange and purple sky. The scene then expands to reveal towering neon industrial structures on the left and illuminated corporate billboards on the right, passing under overhead gantries and overpasses. Finally, the camera follows the flow of traffic as it accelerates toward the glowing skyline of the city ahead.
